
### Scan summary
- Reviewed `README.md` plus both scout inputs (`grok-social-signals.md`, `arxiv-rss-signals.md`) and filtered by the 3-of-4 inclusion checklist.
- Excluded low-signal/low-fit items: `MLAgentBench` is already listed; DSPy/LangGraph/Phoenix signals were integration/release-oriented with weaker recent empirical agentic-ML evidence; most RSS papers were generic agent/reasoning work rather than ML workflow automation.

### Candidates
- **RF-Agent: Automated Reward Function Design via Language Agent Tree Search**  
  URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.23876  
  Rationale: Formulates reward engineering as an MCTS-guided language-agent loop and reports measurable gains across 17 control tasks, making it a concrete agentic ML optimization contribution.  
  Checklist criteria: goal-directed ML planning; tool-using ML lifecycle execution; iterative feedback loop; empirical ML outcome.

### README updates made
- Inserted `RF-Agent` under **Search & Planning Methods** in [README.md](/home/runner/work/awesome-agentic-machine-learning/awesome-agentic-machine-learning/README.md:201) with paper + code links and a concise evidence-backed description.
